planning_summary: Convert the azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_database 'main' resource into an entry within the 'sql_databases' AVM module input for 'avm-res-documentdb-databaseaccount'; all required AVM inputs are mapped or resolved, and outputs referring to the database are directed to the AVM module output.
transformation_description: The azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_database resource will be removed and its definition will be mapped as a child object inside the 'sql_databases' input of the AVM CosmosDB Database Account module. SQL databases are subresources of the AVM module.

attribute_mappings.handling_reason: SQL database name maps directly from resource to AVM subresource name.
resource_group_name is handled at parent AVM module level, not at subresource.
attribute_mappings.additional_notes: AVM module requires resource_group_name at root, not per sql_database.

attribute_mappings.handling_reason: account_name is inferred by the AVM module (parent context); not a per-database setting.

output_mappings.notes: Database name is now output via the AVM module in its sql_databases map.

risk_notes: The transformation is straightforward as the AVM module natively supports CosmosDB SQL databases as subresources. Output mappings are preserved. Minor risk in property mapping if advanced attributes are missed, but not apparent in this case.
